name: composite-dispatch with a profile on a file with no findings stays green and surfaces the active profile
command:
printf 'name: app
' > config.yaml && printf 'name: t
extends: []
rules: {}
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file config.yaml --profile p.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -ne 1 ] && grep -q 'profile=p.yaml' e.txt && echo routed-clean-stays-green 1>&2
